name: Body Mass Index Calculator
description: Industrial-grade BMI calculator with health risk assessment, lean body mass estimation, and actionable wellness insights based on ISO 8996 and Six Sigma health metrics.

inputs.label: Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Body weight measured in kilograms, per ISO 8996 anthropometric standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight measured in kilograms, per ISO 8996 anthropometric standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 8996 antropometrik standartlarına göre kilogram cinsinden vücut ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht in Kilogramm, gemessen nach ISO 8996 anthropometrischen Standards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel mesuré en kilogrammes, selon les normes anthropométriques ISO 8996.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal medido en kilogramos, según normas antropométricas ISO 8996.

inputs.label: Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Standing height in centimeters, measured per ISO 7250 ergonomic guidelines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standing height in centimeters, measured per ISO 7250 ergonomic guidelines.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 7250 ergonomik yönergelerine göre santimetre cinsinden ayakta boy.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stehende Körpergröße in Zentimetern, gemessen nach ISO 7250 ergonomischen Richtlinien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille debout en centimètres, mesurée selon les directives ergonomiques ISO 7250.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de pie en centímetros, medida según pautas ergonómicas ISO 7250.

inputs.label: Age (years)
inputs.businessContext: Chronological age used for metabolic risk adjustment, per Six Sigma health screening protocols.

businessContext_i18n.en: Chronological age used for metabolic risk adjustment, per Six Sigma health screening protocols.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altı Sigma sağlık tarama protokollerine göre metabolik risk ayarlaması için kullanılan kronolojik yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Chronologisches Alter für die metabolische Risikoanpassung, gemäß Six Sigma Gesundheits-Screening-Protokollen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge chronologique utilisé pour l'ajustement du risque métabolique, selon les protocoles de dépistage Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad cronológica utilizada para el ajuste de riesgo metabólico, según protocolos de detección de salud Seis Sigma.

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: Biological sex for lean body mass and risk stratification, per WHO standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Biological sex for lean body mass and risk stratification, per WHO standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: WHO standartlarına göre yağsız vücut kütlesi ve risk sınıflandırması için biyolojik cinsiyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Biologisches Geschlecht für die fettfreie Körpermasse und Risikostratifizierung, nach WHO-Standards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sexe biologique pour la masse maigre et la stratification du risque, selon les normes OMS.
businessContext_i18n.es: Sexo biológico para masa corporal magra y estratificación de riesgo, según estándares de la OMS.

inputs.label: Physical Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Self-reported activity level for energy expenditure estimation, per ISO 8996 metabolic rate classification.

businessContext_i18n.en: Self-reported activity level for energy expenditure estimation, per ISO 8996 metabolic rate classification.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 8996 metabolik hız sınıflandırmasına göre enerji harcaması tahmini için kendinden bildirilen aktivite düzeyi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Selbstberichtetes Aktivitätsniveau zur Schätzung des Energieverbrauchs, nach ISO 8996 Klassifikation der Stoffwechselrate.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau d'activité autodéclaré pour l'estimation de la dépense énergétique, selon la classification du taux métabolique ISO 8996.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de actividad autoinformado para la estimación del gasto energético, según clasificación de tasa metabólica ISO 8996.

inputs.label: Waist Circumference (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Waist measurement for central obesity risk assessment, per IDF and Lean Six Sigma health metrics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Waist measurement for central obesity risk assessment, per IDF and Lean Six Sigma health metrics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: IDF ve Yalın Altı Sigma sağlık metriklerine göre santral obezite risk değerlendirmesi için bel ölçümü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Taillenmaß für die Bewertung des Risikos zentraler Fettleibigkeit, nach IDF und Lean Six Sigma Gesundheitsmetriken.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure du tour de taille pour l'évaluation du risque d'obésité centrale, selon les métriques santé IDF et Lean Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medida de cintura para evaluación de riesgo de obesidad central, según métricas de salud IDF y Lean Seis Sigma.

rules.message: Extreme height-to-weight ratio detected. Verify measurements for accuracy.
High waist circumference in older age group indicates elevated cardiovascular risk.

thresholds.message: Underweight: Increased risk of nutritional deficiencies and osteoporosis.
Overweight: Moderate risk of metabolic syndrome.
Obese Class I: High risk of cardiovascular disease.
Obese Class II: Very high risk. Immediate intervention recommended.
Obese Class III (Severe): Extreme risk. Medical consultation required.
High waist circumference in male: Increased visceral fat risk.
High waist circumference in female: Increased visceral fat risk.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
